rationale: The citation is used with a clear functional role in the empirical design rather than as generic background. In the data section, the authors explicitly state that, following Sorescu, Shankar, and Kushwaha (2007), they use a similar keyword-based Factiva procedure to identify and date new product introductions. That variable is then included as a control in their stock-return model, so the cited paper directly informs measurement and model specification, even though it is not a central theoretical pillar of the focal hypotheses.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Sorescu et al. (2007)'s event-identification approach to build its new product introduction control variable from news sources. It transfers this prior measurement procedure into a different study context focused on how advertising and marketing capability moderate returns to news sentiment.
